E4E.title: Software Engineering Intern
details: Developed interactive maps for machine learning researchers using Leaflet and React
Implemented various buttons to adjust user interface via UseState and Use Effect
Created configurable GeoJSON objects for analysis of environmental research data
Attended weekly meetings to discuss my progress and brainstorm ideas

USDA.title: Data Analytics Intern
details: Used Numpy and Pandas to process Excel data for 10 nationwide nutrition programs
Created 83 graphs to visualize nutrition program participation trends with Matplotlib, Pandas, and Numpy
Assisted with Data Literacy curriculum development for internal data science training program

incy.title: Software Engineering Intern
details: Developed "Reset Password" functionality for 80+ users using TypeScript and Supabase
Automated 300+ email notifications based on user information using TypeScript and Postmark
Developed email templates and databse schema to ensure correct notification formatting
Examined the use of OCR and LLMs to automate insurance quote generation
